ops.text: agent-browser 0.31.2's default clarkbrowser fingerprint build (Chromium 148 + SwiftShader) hangs Page.captureScreenshot indefinitely — even on about:blank — which stalled getaway's docs/scripts/demo.sh board capture. Workaround verified twice: run with AGENT_BROWSER_EXECUTABLE_PATH="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome" and the capture succeeds first try. Needed until the clarkbrowser build is fixed; demo.sh itself is unmodified (also note: it needs invocation via `bash` — no exec bit).
